rulings.Case Title: MARTHA JOAN HILL et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, April 28, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant WHEELABRATOR TECHNOLOGIES, INC.¿s motion to strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint is moot in light of the ruling on the demurrer. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: MARTHA JOAN HILL et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, April 28, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Wheelabrator Technologies, Inc.¿s demurrer is sustained with 10 leave to amend as to all causes of action. Plaintiffs represented that they intend to file an amended complaint but has not yet done so. Although defendant¿s demurrer was filed after the stipulated March 25 deadline, the court has discretion to consider late filed pleadings so long as doing so does ¿not affect the substantial rights of the parties.¿ (McAllister v. County of Monterrey, (2007) 147 Cal. App. 4th 253, 281). = (220/HEK)
